skill_targets.title: acme-legacy-api-adapter
skill_targets.rationale: Older API endpoint that has since been deprecated in favour of the gateway.
skill_targets.differentiation_hypothesis: Covers legacy v1 endpoint; lower confidence than new target.
skill_targets.existing_competition: Various API client libraries already exist for this endpoint.
skill_targets.agentic_landscape: Agents rarely use this endpoint since it lacks webhooks
